title: PaymentDeclined.v1
description: Payment Service's deterministic simulator declined a fictional payment. This is a business rejection, not an infrastructure failure — it must never be retried.

reasonCode.description: The simulator's deterministic decline rule that fired. See services/payment-service for the rule.

precedingTechnicalFailureCount.description: How many TIMEOUT/TEMPORARY_ERROR/CIRCUIT_OPEN attempts happened for this order before this decline. A decline is a business rejection recorded on its own first attempt at the current amount, so this is usually 0, but a redelivered InventoryReserved event can retry authorization and hit transient failures before eventually declining. Optional and additive (see contracts/README.md's versioning rule).
